title: redb PostgreSQL and nu_plugin CodeDB relationship decided
owner: David / LifeOS Data Agent / Runtime Kernel
objective: Make the explicit owner decision assigning every macro-state data class exactly once across redb, PostgreSQL+RuVector, and nu_plugin CodeDB, with synchronization direction, durability, recovery, and a safe transition path, grounded in the Architecture Blueprint as the intended spec.

work_items.decision: canonical durable owner; single writer of truth; RuVector native extension (No-Sidecar)

work_items.surface: transient high-frequency state (thoughts, traces, WAL, dedup cache, geometry math)
work_items.decision: intended transient tier; forward-only flush to PostgreSQL via envctl; never a second durable writer

work_items.surface: nu_plugin CodeDB current durable-on-redb source blobs
work_items.decision: transitional; migrate per class to PostgreSQL under one SHA-256 identity using codedb_store_pg::PgStore + blobstore_parity.rs; only after a green live parity run
work_items.restore: verified swap under identical content identity; no data loss

work_items.decision: non-authoritative for shared macro-state; witnessed by SHAKE256 chains rooted in PostgreSQL

work_items.surface: derived projections (materialized dirs for musl builds)
work_items.decision: derived and disposable; re-projected deterministically from PostgreSQL via module_path

corrects: generated/store_001_decision_brief.md (prior brief inverted redb/PostgreSQL authority direction; see store_relationship_decision.json.correction_of_prior_brief)
